programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Antonio Leaves
programme.desc: Due to problems with his family in Mexico, Tony decides to leave the house. When Tadeo realizes there is a free room, he changes his schedule and announces to the group that he will be staying for the rest of the vacation.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: In December 1980, what is considered the biggest UFO case in U.K. history occurs at the U.S.A.F. base at Rendlesham, Suffolk.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Central Scotland has its very own Area 51, known as the Falkirk Triangle, encompassing the village of Bonnybridge, which claims the highest concentration of the region's UFO activity.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah study the evidence available for the mass UFO sighting over Phoenix, Ariz. in 1997.

programme.title: On the Trail of UFOs
programme.desc: In the 1960s the cattle mutilation phenomenon became a widespread concern across the American west..

programme.title: On the Trail of UFOs
programme.desc: The team investigates UFO phenomena like Mothman, Flatwoods Monster, and eyewitness accounts..

programme.title: Weird or What?
programme.desc: A California woman is plagued by an invisible attacker; a teen thinks she can see ghosts.

programme.title: Weird or What?
programme.desc: A skydiver survives a fall when her parachute fails; the possibility of spontaneous human combustion.

programme.title: Weird or What?
programme.desc: A healer claims to cure diseases with prayer.

programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters
programme.desc: George Adamski, a controversial ufologist famous for his flying saucer photos, faces skepticism and belief; his photos, still debated, may support his claims of meeting a man from Venus.

programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters
programme.desc: Eli investigates government scrutiny of George Adamski who despite suppression attempts, stood by his photograph and film evidence, remaining a hotly debated figure in ufology.

programme.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: Mountain State Monsters
programme.desc: Audio collected and experienced across the state of West Virginia is discussed.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar's sisters arrive for a surprise visit. Evelyn lays some tough love on Tamar about returning to work too soon. The sisters distract Tamar from work with some pampering and fun. Tamar & Logan have a date.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar worries about flying after her health scare. While in DC for work, Tamar hangs out with her outrageous sister, Traci. Tamar is shocked when Evelyn reveals she was rushed to the hospital! Pinky the pig.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar & Vince disagree about a house in Atlanta. Logan gets a pig. Evelyn visits LA for the Grammy awards. Tamar & Vince have a pie bake-off with special judge, James Wright Chanel. Vince goes to the hospital!

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: China isn't sure she has what it takes to be Kim's manager. Diva Drag Queens arrive for hair transformations. Brely Evans drops by for a new look. Angela continues to defy Kim and hurt the business.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: In this one hour special, Kim explains the complexities of hairstyles we saw this season while guiding us through the season's highlights, including celebrity clients and never before seen moments.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim opens up a new salon, but is undecided whether Angela will return. China is demoted and Kim's sister takes over as manager. Kim hires a celebrity nail stylist who wreaks havoc the minute she steps foot in the salon.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: A visit from Hank's parents stirs up emotions in Kendra, making her question married life and her relationship with her mom. Past issues surface when Kendra considers contacting her mom.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra enlists the help of an old friend when she signs on for a celebrity cooking show in NYC. Away from home, Kendra confides that she and Hank need to move forward, not backwards, or their marriage is over.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: While working in NYC, Kendra meets her long-lost aunt and gets heated about her fall out with her mom. Later that night, Kendra parties with Eddie and poses for some sexy photos at a gay club.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra heats up the competition on a cooking show in New York while Hank pulls off some big surprises for her 30th birthday. Back home, Kendra gets trashed by Holly Madison in her scandalous tell-all book.

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Team Tutera heads down south to throw a Sweet 16 bash for the daughter of Real Housewives of Atlanta's Cynthia Bailey. When mother and daughter butt heads, will David have to play family therapist?

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: David throws a wedding for his assistant Montre, with the help of Saturday Night Live comedian Leslie Jones. When Montre becomes a groomzilla and Leslie goes missing, will the nuptials even happen?

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles a former singer from Destiny's Child and gives Angela a second chance. China and Angela face-off at the salon. Naja and Leah nearly come to blows.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: A salon contest has an unexpected outcome. Kim and team go to Vegas, to style Syleena Johnson, Lil' Mama and Fantasia. After hours, Naja seduces Dontay.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles Faith Evans, but is frustrated because her VIP suite isn't ready. Kim loses her patience with Leah. Rumors spread about Dontay and Naja. After cocktailing, Angela attacks China during her pedicure with Naja.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar confronts Vince when her performance goes wrong! The strain of career & home begins to show cracks in their marriage. Vince considers risky surgery but Tamar fears for his life!

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Nora decide contarle a Pedro toda la verdad sobre su origen y le muestra en las cámaras de seguridad al hombre que está extorsionando a Humberto, él se da cuenta de que es el Chamoy. Tania descubre a Justino y escapa.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le cuenta a Basilio la verdad sobre el origen de Leonardo. Basilio concluye que son hermanos gemelos, pero Perico se rehúsa a creerlo. El Chamoy le pide a Melquiades el 10% de la taquilla.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro decide ir a su fiesta de cumpleaños, le pide a Basilio que traiga a Leonardo para hablar con él. Fernanda le dice a Santiago que están muy cerca de que los Fuentemayor paguen por lo que han hecho.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio convence a Leonardo de salir para que hable con Pedro, pero Perico no está afuera. Pedro le ofrece dinero al Chamuy, quien le confirma que Leonardo es su hermano gemelo y que Humberto pagó para que se lo robaran.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer le cuenta a Perico una historia falsa de la adopción de Leonardo. Fernanda le pregunta a Pedro por qué ha estado tan callado, él la besa apasionadamente. Justino amenaza a Tania con hacerle daño a Eugenio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio se entera de la devolución del brazalete, se hace pasar por el dueño y se entera de que fue Paloma quien lo devolvió. Le dice que es abogado y le ofrece su ayuda. La cita en un restaurante, ella ve a Pedro con Fernanda.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma se da cuenta de quién es Fernanda y de la relación que lleva con Pedro, llora al creer que Leonardo la engaña. Elmer ve a Yesenia besándose con Rubén y les reclama. Pedro le pregunta a Basilio cómo debe hablar con su hermano.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma y Leonardo discuten, él se va de casa. Ignacio le cuenta a su madre que Leonardo le dio un nombre falso a Paloma y le dijo que tenía amnesia. Leonardo va a casa de Renata, se encuentra a Santiago y logra recordar algo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le dice a Santiago que siente que lo conoce y a él su voz le parece familiar. Fabiola intenta pegarle a Nora y Fernanda interviene. Renata tiene una teoría sobre Leonardo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio va a la casa de Elmer, Fermín le avisa que Pedro está ahí. Recuerda lo extraño que se comportó Leonardo el día que se canceló la boda y se da cuenta de lo que está pasando. Fabiola llama a Rubén y contesta Yesenia.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio visita a Paloma y en eso llega Leonardo, ella le cuenta que el perdió la memoria hace unos meses y que es hijo de Elmer. Citan a Ignacio y al llegar encuentra a Elmer apuntándole con una pistola. Leonardo recuerda a Ignacio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio trata de negociar con Elmer, pero éste le dispara. Leonardo comienza a recordar cada vez más cosas, va a ver a Paloma para decirle que el hombre que estaba en su casa se llama Ignacio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio llega a la oficina de Pedro, le dice que ya sabe que él es Perico y lo amenaza con mandarlo a la cárcel, pero Pedro responde que él mismo se entregará. Santiago le pregunta a Fernanda por qué trabaja con los Fuentemayor.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio le dice a Pedro que guardará el secreto, pero tendrá que hacer lo que él le pida. Se da cuenta de que perdió su celular y manda a Elmer a buscarlo. Fabiola intenta atropellar a Yesenia.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We investigate inexpensive steaks and find out which were worth eating and how best to prepare them. We also take a look at a classic accompaniment to steak: mashed potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When most people think of dishes like lasagna and jambalaya, they think of labor-intensive weekend meals. In this episode, however, we develop versions that could be prepared on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings. Neither requires fancy ingredients or expensive equipment, just a little time and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's for Sunday dinner? Around many American tables, it's meat and potatoes. Beef brisket is a good choice and a nice change from pot roast or beef stew. Although inexpensive and simple to prepare, brisket does pose some challenges to the cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There are certain dinners we rely on again and again. We are particularly fond of roasting chicken and potatoes together in one pan. While the chicken roasts, its juices drip onto the potatoes, giving them a wonderfully rich crust and creamy flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Thanksgiving can strike fear into the heart of even the most proficient cook. However with our turkey and sweet potato casserole recipes, we minimize the work so that the cook can enjoy the holiday as much as everyone else.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a foolproof preparation for pork chops with vinegar and peppers—a modern version tangy and juicy enough to rival that prepared by an Italian grandmother. Next, we turn to pan-roasted pork tenderloin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tuna, which is often served rare to medium-rare, can be particularly tricky to get just right with a nicely seared crust. As for halibut, we developed a technique that ensured perfect texture without a loss of flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some people are intimidated by the thought of preparing fish. Traditional dishes, like Fish Meunière, can seem even more daunting. But you don't need to be wearing a toque to prepare this French classic well.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare an Indian-inspired shrimp curry and a Thai-inspired green curry with chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When you eat chicken frequently, it pays to have a number of preparations on hand. In this episode, we turn to orange-flavored chicken and chicken teriyaki.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia and Bridget prepare a show-stopping special occasion Cider-Braised Pork Roast. Next, Jack challenges Bridget to a sauerkraut tasting. Finally, Bryan teaches Julia the secrets to tackling authentic Pittsburg-style Potato-Cheddar Pierogi at home.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia uncover the secrets to a Latin classic, Arroz con Pollo. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of store-bought whipped topping. And finally, Christie reveals the steps for a Florida favorite, Sour Orange Pie.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia shows Bridget how to make a regional favorite, Southern Style Smothered Chicken. Then, Adam reveals the best Kitchen Timer on the market. Finally, Bridget reveals the secrets to a show-stopping Apple Pandowdy.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget shares steps to achieving perfect Memphis-style Wet Ribs in the Slow Cooker. Next, Jack challenges Julia to an apple-cider vinegar tasting. And finally, Ashley teaches Bridget how to make the leftover favorite, Mashed Potato Cakes from scratch.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up her favorite Bloody Marys with fresh horseradish and homemade cocktail onions plus sheet-pan hash browns for a crowd and springy green Shakshuka.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia resizes Italian classics for families of two or three, starting with a meaty loaf-pan lasagna, crispy artichoke salad with lemon vinaigrette, and a scaled-down version of creamy tiramisu.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes roast beef weeknight-friendly with her cast-iron roast beef with gravy, salt-crusted fingerling potatoes, and carrot-noodle salad with homemade harissa and honey.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes her favorite weeknight dinner featuring a butterflied and Za'tar rubbed roast chicken with homemade preserved lemons, kale and sweet potato salad with pomegranate vinaigrette, and cozy coconut rice pudding.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: One of our favorite Spanish dishes is paella. But with a lengthy ingredient list the shopping alone can give the home cook pause. We take a hard look at paella to see if we can pare back this dish to its humble origins without losing its alluring flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to develop a hassle-free pizza recipe especially for the grill—one we hope will become a new backyard barbecue favorite.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.desc: Former quarterback Art Schlichter was once a living legend at Ohio State University; Art Schlichter throws it all away when he sinks into a gambling addiction, becoming a fast-talking con artist whose only game is looking for the next score.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Musician Donald "Ski" Johnson uses his Jazz for Life foundation to make empty promises that leaves generous donors feeling scammed when his bogus trips to the Grammy Awards turn into red carpet nightmares.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Doug Cassity sells fake prearranged funeral contracts, amounting to $500 million, with the help of sexy saleswomen.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: How gangs are managed in the jail system; how family relationships affect the jail experience.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Up-close and personal with transgender inmates, and inmates with dreams of stardom.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: To their victims, they were epitome of terror and the face of their nightmares; five of the most notorious inmates to ever appear on Lockup reveal startling insights into their shocking brands of predatory behavior.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Sometimes life has other plans, like when the ex leader of a gang faces a whole new reality he discovers the price for coming clean.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In a life full of restrictions, we've seen inmates take control of whatever they can, despite the consequences; we've seen frustrated inmates reach their breaking point; in the battle of wills, some will take actions that can never be reversed.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Behind every murder is a motive; Behind every murder is a story and behind some murders, there is a person someone thought they could trust.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Trevor Cook runs an investment fund and solicits $190 million from U.S. investors that heard his message through talk radio.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man burns through $52 million from a trust he was hired to protect, buying helicopters, fighter jets, rocket launchers, and a fleet of WWII bombers to feed his fantasy of running "black ops" for the CIA.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Inside the rise and near-collapse of WeWork, the startup co-founded by its former CEO, Adam Neumann, who mesmerizes venture capitalists with grandiose promises, even though WeWork turns out to be a traditional real estate leasing business.

programme.desc: Our Lockup crews have found out many times that you never know when things will detonate.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Irita Marriott cruise through Kent in a classic car. James spots a child's rattle that sparks international interest, while Irita's hopes rest on a damaged lamp.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Irita Marriott shop along England's south coast. James buys high value items with his wedge of cash, but Irita makes some canny purchases in a bid to close the gap.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: An old beer bottle and a fish kettle whet James's appetite for profits in East Sussex and Hampshire, while Irita hopes a 19th century puzzle box solves her auction woes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiquers James Braxton and Irita Marriott rummage around the antique shops of Wiltshire and Dorset. Will porcelain or brass bring the experts riches at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and James head to the final auction. Irita's coffers are increasing, but James is hoping an exciting snuff box will make him a small fortune.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: An all-new adventure for experts Catherine Southon and Serhat Ahmet. Together they head from Kent to the capital in search of the old, the unusual and the precious.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon head to the East Midlands in their lilac classic car. They scour the shops for something special to take to auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon rock their way up the coast of East Anglia in their classic car, on the lookout for local delicacies and money-making bygones.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Serhat Ahmet need to make their money go a long way on the penultimate leg of their trip. Every penny counts when it comes to making a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: As their Road Trip race enters its final lap, there's a chance for antiques experts Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon to spend big. But who will take the checkered flag?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Dealers Margie Cooper and Paul Martin pick up Edwardian furniture and tribal art on a road trip through Somerset. Margie goes on a safari while Paul is hoping for big profits.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Somerset Margie Cooper and Paul Martin hunt for money-making antiques. A toy in perfect condition is a prudent purchase, but will a Victorian toilet mean profit down the drain?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique hunters Margie Cooper and Paul Martin head west in search of treasure. Paul buys something no pirate should be without and Margie is drawn to pieces of silver.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Martin and Margie Cooper motor through Cornwall, picking up an antique milking stool and very loud 1920's car horn. A detour allows for a quite unusual cup of tea.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Bristol, the finds include a nautilus shell engraved with Brunel's suspension bridge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include a piece of Swedish glass and an invitation to Sir Walter Scott's funeral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a locket given by Queen Victoria and a Welsh-made classic car.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a medal from the Battle of Waterloo and a Biba umbrella.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a toilet dating from the 1840s and two giant toy giraffes.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces a celebration of the reign of Queen Elizabeth II from Balmoral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a portrait by John Singer Sargent and a decanter from Las Vegas.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a book of police mugshots, a baby bouncer and a musical penknife.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a missionary's medical kit and an early etching by Dame Laura Knight.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds in Plymouth include a pair of doorknobs said to have belonged to Lord Nelson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds in Plymouth include a unique book of garden designs by a renowned landscape gardener.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include original illustrations for a Roald Dahl story and a miniature workshop.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: Svalbard in the Arctic spends many months of the year in complete darkness, an unrelenting frozen winter with temperatures down to 40 below Celsius.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta is a lush wetland of islands and lagoons in the middle of the vast, featureless Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines how fleas jump; he tracks the true speed of a cheetah.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines orangutans and crows, two unusual animals that use tools.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated people for centuries; he looks at the expandable bodies of anacondas and camels.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at some species with unusual styles of consuming food, including the gigantic blue whales and the flamboyant flamingos.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines some species with remarkable healing properties.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at the incredible animals who can regenerate entire parts of their bodies, like salamanders and deer.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines bizarre and deadly hybrid animals.

programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines animals with the ability to find their way.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines the sizes of animals' young.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough discovers if animals and plants can count.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough investigates two shells that win at evolution.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores animals with fighting behavior.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: Something strange in the water in the Caribbean; a four-foot worm in a fish tank; a tick turns America vegetarian.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: A crab is milked for its blue blood; stones move by themselves; thousands of rabbits chase down tourists.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: A virgin snake gives birth in the U.K.; a sea serpent washes up in the U.S.; goats stand still in a tree in Morocco.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Fruits of the Sea
programme.desc: Rick Stein uses the humble whelk to make a mouth-watering dish and prepares one of the sea's treasures -- bass.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Fruits of the Sea
programme.desc: For Mayday, Rick cooks a fish pasta, talks about oysters and cooks baked Cod Portuguese; Rick goes out fishing with two friends and makes crab pasties for them.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Fruits of the Sea
programme.desc: A special dish for the Royal Navy of ragout with turbot and scallops.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Fruits of the Sea
programme.desc: Rick travels to Australia, a country he first visited 30 years ago; in Sydney, Rick prepares spicy laksa, barbecued fish and seared tuna.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The series starts in autumnal Bordeaux. Rick arrives just in time to judge a local wine contest, and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owners of Marley's on the Beach may lose their business and their marriage if Jon can't reverse the financial strain put on them by the failings of their bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a Bar Rescue first, Jon helps a failing strip club saddled with a disinterested staff, a skeevy vibe, and an off-putting name: Chix on Dix.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to rescue a bar in Maricopa, Arizona whose owner has squandered a half a million dollar investment from his parents.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Tampa, Florida to help save an owner who has suffered personal loss and health scares while trying to single-handedly keep his struggling bar afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his hometown of Las Vegas, Jon rescues a beloved party bar that blames their downfall on the pandemic until Jon discovers the truth.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Gibsonton, Florida, Jon must help rescue not only a failing bar but a broken marriage after the Covid pandemic destroyed both their business and their relationship.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps an owner who battled childhood illness and the loss of his father learn how to run a bar and manage a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A riverside bar in Florida is struggling to stay afloat due to a manager with no experience, a staff co-mingling, and a wildly out of line menu for their community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a series of devastating losses, Jon must help an owner and her staff get back on track from their personal tragedies as well as a global pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In the heart of Atlanta, Jon helps an owner seize her second chance in life by saving her struggling bar and managing her staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In the heart of Texas, Jon must help an owner figure out how to be a better boss and help her personal assistant step up to lead the bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Dunwoody, Georgia, Jon Taffer tries to help a former hospitality professional regain his passion for the industry and save his flailing bar.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and the geological team are trapped underwater by a massive earthquake! Hobie's and Jackie's lives hang in the balance. It is up to the Baywatch team to save them before it's too late!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a recent earthquake which almost took his life, Hobie leaves California to live with his mother in Ohio. When they both show up at headquarters a few weeks later Mitch is surprised, especially when he hears the reason they are there.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: John Cort shows up at headquarters and convinces Mitch to compete in the Baja Run dune buggy race with him. What Mitch doesn’t know is Cort is keeping a secret which could land them both in a Mexican prison.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch has to work a 24-hour shift with Stephanie and entrusts Hobie with the responsibility of taking care of himself during that time. But Hobie becomes infatuated with an older girl and is pressured into throwing a party without Mitch’s knowledge.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Carter McKay has recently moved to Southern California to live with his father after his mother's death. When Hobie invites him to the annual father/son lifeguard competition Hobie learns the reason Carter is so embarrassed by his father.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a woman Mitch refers to as “The Mermaid” turns out to be the wife of a crime boss, an FBI agent comes to catch him before he can escape the country. Things become complicated when Mitch and the catty FBI Agent butt heads.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The beach descends into chaos when DJ Larry "Loomin" Large announces a beach wide treasure hunt for a gold pirate doubloon worth $100,000. The Baywatch team is put on high alert when thousands of reckless treasure hunters storm the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When the hot Santa Ana winds move in from the desert, things start heating up on the Baywatch beach in more ways than one, as it seems like all the “weirdos” in the world have been blown to the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Tracy, a lifeguard-turned-hovercraft expert, arrives at Baywatch to demonstrate the benefits of the new rescue vehicle. Meanwhile, The National Pro Beach Volleyball Tour arrives, reigniting Matt's desire to be a professional beach volleyball star.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt and Hobie rescue a young boy who is being harassed by a thug and take care of him until they can get him to his mother, but he seems to be hiding a deep dark secret. Meanwhile, CJ falls for a handsome young man who turns out to be taboo.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Joey joins Mitch and Hobie in decorating for Christmas. CJ has a great time working with Father Ryan but starts to worry that he may misinterpret her warmth as flirting, and that he may be considering quitting the priesthood for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan's visa is soon to expire, and he will be sent back to Australia unless he gets a green card. He plans on earning the money to purchase one in an upcoming boat race. Meanwhile Mitch’s mother visits.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie is kidnapped by an eco-terrorist. The Baywatch team must stop the terrorist before she blows up an oil rig with Stephanie constrained inside it!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch proposes to Tracy, but the happy moment is short-lived as she reveals she has a terminal illness. With the team being short-staffed it is up to Logan and Caroline to deal with reckless wave runners.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Welterweight World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima puts his belt on the line against undefeated Ukrainian Yaroslav 'Dynamo' Amo-sov. Legendary knockout artist Paul 'Semtex' Daley collides with Jason 'The Ass Kicking Machine' Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Interim Heavyweight World Champion-ship is up for grabs as Tim Johnson collides with Fedor Team protege Valentin Moldavsky. Also Liz 'Girl-Rilla' Carmouche returns to the Bellator MMA cage to battle undefeated Japanese sensation Kana Watanabe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: World Champions collide as Juliana Velasquez looks to make the first defense of her Bellator MMA Women’s Flyweight World Championship when she takes on Bellator Kickboxing Flyweight World Champion Denise 'Miss Dynamite' Kielholtz.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator G.O.A.T. Patricio Pitbull puts his Featherweight World Championship on the line against undefeated sensation AJ 'Mercenary' McKee in the $1,000,000 Bellator MMA Featherweight World Grand Prix Finals in a matchup literally years in the making.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: 6-time MMA World Champion Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousasi puts his Bellator MMA Middleweight World Championship on the line against the division’s top-ranked contender, tenacious submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls, South Dakota where heavyweight MMA icons collide as French knockout artist Cheick Kongo takes on Russian destroyer Sergei Kharitonov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in San Jose as Former Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis welcomes Yoel 'Soldier of God' Romero to the Bellator cage as the Cuban sensation makes his highly anticipated promo-tional debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: A highly anticipated rematch between former World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima and human highlight reel Michael 'Venom' Page takes center stage in London, and fast-rising Irish star Leah 'The Curse' McCourt battles Jessica 'Black Widow' Borga.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 1992, 17-year-old Shawna was robbed while at work. Jerrie, 14, held her at gunpoint demanding money: the gun went off, destroying Shawna's jaw. Shawna, now 39, and Jerrie, out of prison, meet on Dr. Phil’s stage for the first time since the shooting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: For the past 2 years Nancy has been in an online relationship with "Shaun" she says is an honest and loving man. Her son Darcy says Nancy doesn't even know what he looks like! Nancy is adamant she is not being scammed in this catfish story of online love.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Connie wrote Dr. Phil for help, concerned for her grandchildren. Jennifer's daughter drank bleach from her sippy cup when she was 3 and was found with a backpack of maggots, mold and rotten milk at 7. Dr. Phil delves into Jennifer's history as a parent.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Two survivors of abduction, Katie Beers and Sarah Maynard, share their stories in exclusive interviews with Dr. Phil. How did they survive their horrifying ordeals?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kala Brown continues to tell her story of captivity by a serial killer. She claims her alleged abductor hoped she would one day fall in love with him. Inside her fight to survive and her dramatic rescue. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Don't miss Dr. Phil receiving his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame! Plus, time is of the essence for mom Cindy. Daughter Cheyenne, 24, is a college student, Cindy's caretaker & sole financial supporter. Boyfriend, Blake, calls Cheyenne 'Cinderella'.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodie says since husband Edwin won $1.66 million in a lottery pool, he's angry, distant, secretive & the marriage is in trouble. Edwin says problems started way before his money win. The couple talks to Dr. Phil wondering if their marriage can be saved.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason & Shady have a blended family on the verge of falling apart. After knowing each other 2 months & meeting in person 1 time, they married. Each brought children into their new home & with seven kids under one roof, life isn't what anyone expected.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Monster-In-Law Khalood last met with Dr. Phil, she wanted her lazy kids out of her house and invited Dr. Phil to her home to prove her claims. Dr. Phil takes Khalood up on her offer, and gets a firsthand look at what’s going on behind closed doors!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jon says he hates his selfish, untrustworthy dad, Jim, who works the holidays as Santa Claus! Then, pro-trainer Greg thinks he's on the show to talk health. Troy Dunn surprises him with his long-lost son! And 14-yr-old singing sensation Jackie Evancho!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany says boyfriend Tim is evil, abusive & unfaithful. Tim admits that he can't control his rage & choked Brittany while holding their 6-month-old daughter & says he fears he'll hurt the baby next. Tim confesses to cheating with both men and women.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha & Danielle are angry with dad, Ron, who they say abandoned their dying mother, his wife of 30 yrs, to plan a wedding with a Kennedy heiress he met online. His daughters say "Misty Kennedy" is a catfish. Ron says "Misty" is the love of his life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After former friends Randi & Haley tell Brittany's history of harassing men & faking pregnancies, Dr. Phil talks to Brittany and asks her to prove she is pregnant. What sent Brittany storming off stage? See the backstage conversation with Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Harv and Lynne say their son, Mark, is an adolescent living in a 41-year-old man’s body. Mark is currently homeless and living in his beat-up car held together with bungee cords and glue. But Mark explains that he is “car camping” and not homeless.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bobby Moynihan tackles the latest headlines including why 69% of Americans are feeling overwhelmed by their TV & movie watch list, what your dreams are trying to tell you, how which emoji you use can affect your desirability when flirting and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The most followed family on TikTok and stars of "The D'Amelio Show," Charli, Dixie, Heidi and Marc D'Amelio reveal what it's like sharing their life with over 224 million people around the world.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Celeste Barber, known for her hilarious celebrity parodies, joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover the latest headlines including the one perk employees most wish their employer would offer and share Rihanna's latest collab.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering everything from the new freemium trend in dating apps to the grinch getting a horror makeover this Christmas to the great 1860 painting cellphone debate.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: Camilla Cabello opens-up about dating, what she's looking for in her next partner, working with relationship goals couple Gwen Stefani and Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un marine hallado en su garaje lleva a sospechar al protegido del FBI, Tobias Fornell. La investigación se intensifica cuando el sospechoso huye de un nuevo crimen. Ziva, mientras planea sus vacaciones, descubre una foto misteriosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga un crimen durante la temporada de Halloween, donde un asesino psicótico deja pistas sobre la identidad de su próxima víctima en la red.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un desafío cuando Vance le asigna un nuevo asistente novato para investigar un caso de robo a un banco. La tensión aumenta mientras Gibbs y su nuevo compañero tratan de resolver el crimen y superar sus diferencias en el camino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Otra mirada
programme.desc: Frank se toma a pecho uno de los casos de Jamie cuando se trata de la sospechosa muerte de la esposa de su amigo, el agente del FBI Wilson Ortega (Emiliano Diez), quién tenía una enfermedad terminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El precio a pagar
programme.desc: Frank trabaja para reivindicar al detective Douglas McKenzie (Mike Carlsen), acusado de uso excesivo de la fuerza. Además, Danny y Baez siguen la pista del asesino responsable de la muerte del guardaespaldas de un rapero.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hipocresía
programme.desc: Frank no sabe qué hacer con la queja del ex policía Rick Austin (Evan Arthur Hall) sobre su pensión. Además, Jamie ayuda a un amigo, Connor O'Brien (Brian Hutchison), a lidiar con unas fotos ilícitas de su hija en Internet.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Estándares altos
programme.desc: Jamie y Frank chocan en sus puntos de vista sobre el trato que el público le dio a la policía después de que unos adolescentes revoltosos arrojaran agua sobre dos novatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un desafío cuando Vance le asigna un nuevo asistente novato para investigar un caso de robo a un banco. La tensión aumenta mientras Gibbs y su nuevo compañero tratan de resolver el crimen y superar sus diferencias en el camino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un sorprendente secreto sale a la luz cuando el equipo se ve envuelto en un juego de guerra, y uno de sus miembros enfrentará serias consecuencias.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de una revelación inesperada, el equipo de NCIS debe detener el robo de secretos gubernamentales usando información de fuentes dudosas.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: During his cancer treatments, Chris had to sell his Kenworth to pay the never-ending medical bills. By an amazing stroke of luck, he tracked down his old Kenworth and was able to buy it back.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure's on for rookies and vets as the hopefuls head to the stadium for their first field rehearsal, and Kelli and Judy must decide which women won't move on in training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers get a chance to showcase their unique talents during show group auditions, and Kelli and Judy deliberate with guest judges to select the elite squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers test their ability to think on their toes during a series of mock-press interviews, and as auditions wind down, a shocking bit of news shakes up the process for Kelli and Judy.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make cuts via video chat after a positive test for COVID-19 halts camp, Charlotte Jones hands out the iconic uniforms, and the team performs its game-day entrance.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The trip to Miami gets off to a great start until the sun goes down and shots get poured. When Mattie goes missing, Don "Daddy" Johnson is on the case. Back at the house, Lyle makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle's girlfriend, Santana, comes to visit but little does she know her life is going to change forever. All of the roommates come together to plan the most perfect marriage proposal for Lyle.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle gets an answer for his proposal and the gang throws Mattie an 80s skating birthday party. Tiffany learns some troubling news about Hannah's boyfriend, Cody. Martha redecorates the boys' bedroom.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: It's the last weekend in St. Pete and the roommates want to go out with a bang. Single Lauren hits the town, Murray catches a shark, Walt brings home an animal lover and Hannah confronts Cody about his infidelity.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast gets together to rehash their latest vacation in St. Petersburg, Florida… the good, the bad, and the hurricanes.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany and Lauren tell Lyle devastating news about his fiancée, Santana. In an attempt to woo a woman into bed, Walt plays some sweet, out-of-tune tunes on his guitar. Daddy brings the wrong girl home from the bar.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Murray wraps up his personal business in Mississippi and returns to the house to learn that the girls are still all up in Lyle and Santana's relationship. Murray convinces Santana to come visit so the couple can talk face to face & figure things out.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man flees from cops and reaches a dead end. A 40mm impact round is used to gain compliance when he reaches for his pockets. A man claims his anger got the best of him during an armed robbery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers set up a sting designed to capture unsuspecting bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a routine traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer pulls over a vehicle after observing a suspected prostitute enter the vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect attempts to flee from police, officers find a wanted man trespassing in someone's yard, and officers stop two people suspected of stealing a moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Cops pursue a man skipping bail, an impaired driver is surprisingly cooperative, and officers struggle to remove a violent offender from a crime scene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control of the vehicle and runs into a stop sign. With the aid of stop sticks, a driver’s car becomes disabled. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a drug house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man hands police his gun unannounced, an oblivious suspect tries to make money ripping off two detectives, and a driver's inability to do simple math lands her in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver theorizes about America after fleeing a traffic stop, charges keep adding up for an unlicensed driver, and a woman stops at nothing to get to her trailer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a present-day crime with ties to a mob heist that occurred 25 years ago. Meanwhile, Brass has a decision to make when his daughter attempts suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a robbery and fatal shooting at a medical marijuana shop.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara and Greg are quarantined after responding to a crime scene contaminated with a deadly pathogen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team suspects foul play when a chemistry teacher's science experiment goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Morgan, Sidle, and Finlay try to relax at a forensics conference when a mass shooting occurs on site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Frustration mounts for the CSI team as another victim surfaces, and all evidence points to the Gig Harbor Killer. Guest stars include Mark-Paul Gosselaar, Mark Valley, and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman full of alcohol and drugs in a pool at a rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder at Clark County jail after an inmate stumbles upon a body while running away from officers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the bizarre death of a man who was killed not once, but twice. Sharon Osbourne guest stars as Elise Massey, the manager of a billiards championship.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI's investigation of the victim of an apparent hit-and-run leads them into the world of aeronautics.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team reopens a 10-year-old murder/suicide case when the sole survivor claims her accused father was innocent.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team learns the main suspect in the gig harbor killings is being released from jail due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hombres son asesinados justo antes de exponer a una compañía de gas natural por envenenar a residentes en una ciudad agrícola. Ahora el equipo CSI debe descubrir quién es responsable de sus muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La caída fatal de un hombre desde el balcón de un hotel lanza al equipo de CSI a una investigación para determinar si su muerte fue suicidio o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI se propusieron localizar a un pedófilo sospechoso de asesinar a la esposa de un agente del FBI y secuestrar a sus hijos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una foto aparentemente falsa de una prostituta muerta aparece en línea, el equipo de CSI sigue una pista para encontrar a la mujer que fue asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI vinculó un cuerpo con quemaduras graves a una posible ejecución por una silla eléctrica y a un legendario asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: U+000AUna noche llena de celebración termina con una explosión cuando el director de una fundación de becas para sordos es asesinado por un mortal coche bomba, lo que llevó a Sara a interrogar a los estudiantes y profesores de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una donación de segunda mano se vuelve espantosa cuando se encuentra un cadáver en una caja. Mientras tanto, la esposa de Langston hace una visita sorpresa al laboratorio criminalístico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifica contra el famoso asesino de 'Dick y Jane', Nate Haskell. Mientras tanto, Nick recibe una llamada de un adolescente con problemas, Jason McCann, para advertirle del peligro inminente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo CSI está en alerta zombi cuando dos hombres inicialmente declarados muertos misteriosamente vuelven a la vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ex policía convicto, el equipo de CSI se topa con una lista en su celda de la prisión con los nombres de varias personas que creía que podrían haber sido el verdadero asesino de su esposa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una serie de muertes instigan una apuesta entre el equipo de CSI en cuanto a si han "golpeado para el ciclo," un homicidio, un suicidio, un accidente y una muerte natural en una sola noche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Sara se dirigen a Lady Heather en busca de ayuda para localizar al culpable responsable de herir a una mujer antes de que aparentemente fuera mutilada hasta la muerte por un león de montaña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de su fuga, Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane", reaparece cuando envía por correo electrónico un inquietante video de amenaza de muerte al padre de una de sus novias.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston se vuelve más decidido que nunca a localizar a Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane," después de descubrir que ha secuestrado a su ex esposa, Gloria.

programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team unravel a complicated workplace murder mystery when a hated receptionist is found murdered in beautiful Miami.

programme.desc: Spring Break raises the body count in Miami when Horatio Caine and the CSI team splits up to solve three different murders.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's ex-girlfriend is killed in an explosion, the team looks within their own department to find the killer.

programme.desc: The CSI team suffers the tragic loss of one of their own when a psychotic genius runs wild in otherwise beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the killer of Horatio's wife busts out of prison and goes on a rampage, they must determine what he's after and find him before he strikes again.

programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar el asesinato de un inmigrante de Europa del Este asesinado a puñaladas en una cabina de espectáculos eróticos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se apresuran para encontrar nuevas pruebas para un juicio en curso por asesinato para evitar la condena de un hombre posiblemente inocente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se suponía que era un viaje encubierto de rutina al incinerador para deshacerse de pruebas de drogas, pero emboscan a los oficiales de policía.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El caso de Horatio de una mujer asesinada se ve comprometido cuando se involucran los agentes federales, que tienen su propio plan a seguir.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un ex-convicto que Horatio envió a la cárcel le pide que lo ayude a encontrar a su hijo desaparecido. Él encuentra marihuana mientras busca en la habitación del chico.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Estudiantes de todo el país van a Miami para pasar una semana de diversión bajo el sol. La fiesta se interrumpe cuando llaman al equipo de CSI a dos casos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle y Delko están disfrutando de un lugar nocturno de moda en Miami, Club Descent, cuando la pirotecnia del DJ desencadena un incendio que arrasa al club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en la cultura de las drogas después de que ocurre un brutal asesinato y una explosión casi fatal en la casa de un adicto a la metanfetamina.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando llaman a Horatio al Centro de Detención de West Miami para investigar a un preso asesinado, termina presenciando la fuga de tres presos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que una joven modelo es asesinada por un conductor que se da a la fuga, Horatio investiga al dueño del auto, que afirma que se lo prestó a los invitados a su fiesta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un hombre arponeado a su yate lleva a Horatio al mundo de la búsqueda de tesoros en la actualidad y a la enorme codicia que viene aparejada.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se llevan a la fenómeno del tenis Lana Walker de su habitación por la noche y la única evidencia que tienen para continuar es una fibra púrpura encontrada en el marco de la ventana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando golpean casi hasta la muerte a una ex-víctima de violación, Horacio debe entrar al mundo de las cárceles y las personas en libertad condicional para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un robo/homicidio deja a dos hombres muertos y a un tercero aún con vida, Horacio está decidido a averiguar qué sucedió realmente.

programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.desc: After a night of heavy partying two underage girls make the reckless decision to drive home. In route, the girls get into an accident.

programme.desc: La electrocución de un joven en el tercer riel del metro conduce al mundo de un deporte extremo donde correr riesgos es parte del juego.

programme.desc: Los dueños de perros competidores se convierten en los principales sospechosos de una investigación de asesinato cuando el detective Mac Taylor examina la muerte de un adiestrador de perros.
